Silver is the Leader and Warden of [[Mt. Boulder Gym]], who only makes an appearance in Pokémon Prism.

==Trivia==
*His name, appearance, and reference to [[Johto||Johto's]] Sprout Tower suggest that he is the same Silver from the mainline series.
**Ironically, as [[Giovanni]] is his father, this means that he comes to inherit the Gym that his parent was once the Leader of.
